version_description: The chord arrangement in the Bm key is a nice way to play this as opposed to starting in Em as you can work the base notes of the chords giving you a fuller sound when playing solo accoustic. Also I play the second line of the chorus a little different with an A7 to E or E7 but it makes for a cool sounding cover with a bit more melody in the singing.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
'Wild Boys' - Duran Duran

Here's my arrangement for acoustic guitar of this 80's pop toon.


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
The wild boys are calling [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
On their way back from the fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
In august moon's surrender to[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
A dust cloud on the rise[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]      
Wild boys fallen far from glory[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Reckless and so hungered[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
On the razors edge you trail[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Because there's murder by the roadside[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]
In a sore afraid new world[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
They tried to break us,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]                 
Looks like they'll try again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#7[/ch]
Wild boys never lose it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Wild boys never chose this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#7[/ch]
Wild boys never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Wild boys always shine[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] 
You got sirens for a welcome[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
There's bloodstain for your pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
And your telephone been ringing while[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
You're dancing in the rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Wild boys wonder where is glory[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Where is all you angels[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now the figureheads have fell[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
And lovers war with arrows over[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Secrets they could tell[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch] 
They tried to tame you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]  
Looks like they'll try again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#7[/ch]
Wild boys never lose it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Wild boys never chose this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#7[/ch]
Wild boys never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Wild boys always shine[/tab]
